messages.text:
What it is: Pipeline-board render round 2: wider descriptions (landscape), drop redundant PK, distinct parked/paused/intake/recently-closed sections, and a GitHub link list below the grid
How it works: The stage grid's slug column shows a short kebab slug (2-3 words)
